item.title: Eco Youths Network - UG
item.description:
About Eco Youths Network

Eco Youths Network is a youth-led community organization committed to promoting environmental conservation, sustainable development, and youth empowerment. Through education, community engagement, and practical environmental initiatives, the organization works to inspire young people to become active stewards of their communities and the environment, through food production and nature protection.

What they Do

  • Environmental Education — Organizing awareness campaigns, workshops, and training sessions that educate young people and communities about environmental protection, climate change, and sustainable practices.
  • Tree Planting & Conservation — Coordinating tree-planting activities, habitat restoration projects, and conservation initiatives that contribute to greener and healthier communities.
  • Youth Empowerment — Equipping young people with leadership skills, environmental knowledge, and opportunities to participate in community development and sustainability projects.
  • Community Engagement — Working with schools, local leaders, and community groups to promote environmental responsibility and encourage collective action toward a sustainable future..

Verification Notes

The Uganda Verified team conducted a video call on 12th June, 2026 with the Executive Director, reviewed the CBO Board registration certificate (WCBO/25/1110), and confirmed the organization’s physical headquaters/office in Kiboga, Kampala.

item.title: Nuwagaba Gift
item.description:
About Nuwagaba Gift

Nuwagaba is a resident in Wakiso, where he runs the local organisation called “Filling the Empty Stomachs Farming Initiative”, which he started in mid 2025.

What he Does

  • Farming Activities — He runs a 1.5 acre farm, and always share his food with needy families in Wakiso

  • Community Empowerment — Equipping people with leadership and farming skills which helps them maximise food production in his sustainable project.

item.title: Pacific Byiringiro
item.description:
About Pacific Byiringiro

Pacific is the Co-Founder of Eco Youths Network, a youth-led community Based Organization committed to promoting environmental conservation, sustainable development, and youth empowerment. Through education, community engagement, and practical environmental initiatives, the organization works to inspire young people to become active stewards of their communities and the environment, through food production and nature protection.

What Pacific Does

  • Environmental Education — Organizing awareness campaigns, workshops, and training sessions that educate young people and communities about environmental protection, climate change, and sustainable practices.
  • Tree Planting & Conservation — Coordinating tree-planting activities, habitat restoration projects, and conservation initiatives that contribute to greener and healthier communities.
  • Youth Empowerment — Equipping young people with leadership skills, environmental knowledge, and opportunities to participate in community development and sustainability projects.
  • Community Engagement — Working with schools, local leaders, and community groups to promote environmental responsibility and encourage collective action toward a sustainable future..

Verification Notes

The Uganda Verified team conducted a video call on 12th June, 2026 with Pacific, and he proved his Ugandan residence and also submitted the CBO Board registration certificate (WCBO/25/1110), and confirmed the organization’s physical headquaters/office in Kiboga, Uganda.

item.title: Sustainable Schools Network
item.description:
About Sustainable Schools Network (SSN)

Sustainable Schools Network (SSN) is an organization dedicated to promoting sustainability, environmental awareness, and climate action within educational institutions. By working with students, teachers, and school communities, SSN helps integrate sustainable practices into everyday learning and school operations.

What We Do

Sustainability Education — Delivering training, workshops, and educational programs that help students and educators understand environmental challenges and sustainable solutions.

School Greening Initiatives — Supporting schools in implementing projects such as tree planting, waste management, school gardens, and energy conservation activities.

item.title: Wandaye Ethan Timothy
item.description:
About Ethan Timothy

Ethan Timothy is a frontend developer, the co-founder of Uganda verified, KastKlimmers, Eco Youths Network and Sustainable Schools Network. He is among the verifying team on the Uganda verified

What Ethan Does

  • Maintaining this platform — Being the Founder and the main developer of this platform, its among my duties to onboard all the veriffied members and also help in screening(verifying) of candidates
  • Writes Software code — As a Frontend dev, Ethan is a coder, builds website applications
  • Eco Projects — Works with students to establish edible gardens and youth community members to take postive actions towards climate change and organic food production

Verification Notes

Ethan built this web application, and he is still maintaining it, which is direct proof that he is a frontend developer.
